v3.dependence_note: for every chronologically ordered frozen target t, E[d_t | F_(t-1)] <= 0 under the harmful-challenger null for the [-C, C]-clipped unit with preregistered C; pair, models, q_v1, target order, MASE scale, clip ratio and the ordered challenger family (Bonferroni delta/K) are frozen before V2

pairing_manifest.training_input_order: sorted selected integer ids then seeded epoch permutations
